policy_name: National Super Top Up Mediclaim Policy

min_entry_age.source_quote: Entry age of Proposer should be between eighteen years and sixty five years

max_entry_age.source_quote: Maximum entry age of any family member is sixty five years

min_child_entry_age.source_quote: Children above the entry age of three months may be covered for the first time

sum_insured_options.source_quote: Policy is available with following combinations of Threshold and Sum Insured (in ₹): Threshold Sum Insured (above Threshold) 2 Lakhs 3,5,7 Lakhs 3 Lakhs 3,5,7,10 Lakhs 5 Lakhs 5,7,10,15 Lakhs 8 Lakhs 8,10,15,20 Lakhs 10 Lakhs 10,15,20,30 Lakhs 20 Lakhs 20,30,50,80 Lakhs

grace_period.source_quote: Grace Period for payment of the premium shall be thirty days

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: First 30 days waiting period (Excl 03) a) Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within thirty (30) days from the first policy commencement date shall be excluded

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: shall be excluded until the expiry of 90 days/ one year/ two year (as specified against specific disease/ procedure) of continuous coverage

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: Maternity Expenses Covered up to Sum Insured after waiting period of 3 years, No Sub Limit Modern Treatment (12 nos)

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Pre-hospitalisation 30 days immediately before hospitalisation Post-hospitalisation 60

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Post-hospitalisation 60 days immediately after discharge Day Care Procedures 140+ day ca

day_care_treatments_count.source_quote: 140+ day care procedures/surgeries, organ donor's medical expenses, hospital cash

network_hospital_count.source_note: 5322 Network Hospitals ('Why Choose NICL' section, scraped 2026-05-15)

ayush_coverage.source_quote: 1.2.5 AYUSH Treatment: The Company shall indemnify Medical Expenses incurred for Inpatient Care treatment under Ayurveda, Yoga and Naturopathy, Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy systems of medicines during each Policy Period up to the limit of Sum Insured

maternity_coverage.source_quote: 1.2.9 Maternity The Company shall indemnify Maternity Expenses as described below for any female Insured Person, and also Pre-Natal and Post-Natal Hospitalisation expenses per delivery, including expenses for necessary vaccination for the New Born Baby

newborn_coverage.source_quote: New Born Baby shall be automatically covered from birth under the Sum Insured available to the mother during the corresponding Policy Period, for up to 3 months of age.

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: 1.2.6 Organ Donor's Medical Expenses The Company shall indemnify the Medical Expenses incurred in respect of an organ donor's Hospitalisation during the Policy Period for harvesting of the organ donated to an Insured Person

domiciliary_treatment.source_quote: 5.9. Out Patient Department (OPD) or Domiciliary treatment Any expenses incurred on OPD or Domiciliary treatment.

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: cashless facility shall be available provided all evidences and documents are produced prior to cashless authorization, to sub

no_claim_bonus_cap_pct.source_quote: not be accumulated in excess of 50% of the Basic Sum Insured

tat_cashless_authorization_hours.source_quote: pre-authorization letter within an hour to the hospital after verification

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: Cumulative Bonus (CB) • CB at 5% of Sum Insured
